g.text: Accessible user interfaces and assistive technologies ensuring perceivable,
operable, understandable, and robust interaction (WCAG 2.1 Level AA)

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 9.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #3e6e93

g.text: Applies HCI principles (AAD, PTD, CID, UAC) to present information clearly,
reduce cognitive load, and support inclusive interaction.

text.style: font-weight: 700; font-size: 9.6px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans'; text-anchor: middle; fill: #a9772f

g.text: Implements consent management, access control, and auditable workflows through
